summary: Large Zebes stage decompilation PR, mostly AI-assisted per the PR body, replacing many grzebes.c nonmatching stubs with C implementations and adding the stage-local data, callback tables, ground state layouts, material/zako generator prototypes, and symbol-map corrections needed to support them. Review focused on avoiding misleading static data declarations before the file is fully matched, using in-place literals for OSReport and Vec3 constants, and letting HSD_ASSERT strings reveal better temp names later.

key_files.reason: Main change: added about 2k lines of Zebes stage C, new structs, callback table, static/runtime data, and implementations for many previously stubbed functions.
Expanded Zebes ground variable layouts, including grZebes_GroundVars3/4/5 and more precise fields for existing Zebes vars.
Added public prototypes for newly implemented Zebes functions and refined existing signatures such as grZebes_801DA3F4(Vec3*) and grZebes_801DCBFC(Ground_GObj*, HSD_GObj*, void*).
Updated Zebes data/sdata2 symbols, including renaming grZe_803E1A30 to grZe_callbacks and converting several tentative grZe_* constants to local @NNN symbols.
Made grMaterial_801C8D44 non-static so Zebes code could call it.
Declared grMaterial_801C8D44 with typed callback parameters used by the Zebes material setup code.
Refined grZakoGenerator_801CA43C from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to s32 grZakoGenerator_801CA43C(void*, HSD_JObj*, f32).

what_changed: Implemented many grZebes functions that were previously left as /// # stubs, including setup/update routines such as grZebes_801D8558, grZebes_801D8644, grZebes_801D881C, grZebes_801D9100, grZebes_801D925C, grZebes_801D9508, grZebes_801D9798, grZebes_801D99E0, grZebes_801D9F84, grZebes_801DA0C4, grZebes_801DA254, grZebes_801DA3F4, grZebes_801DA528, grZebes_801DAA08, grZebes_801DB3CC, grZebes_801DBB60, grZebes_801DC260, grZebes_801DC408, grZebes_801DC744, grZebes_801DC9DC, and grZebes_801DCBFC.

Added local Zebes helper structs such as grZe_ColorEntry, grZe_AcidLevelEntry, grZe_YakumonoParam, grZe_BubbleEntry, grZe_BubbleConfig, and grZe_AcidState to describe acid, bubble, color, and stage parameter data.

Added or corrected Zebes stage data, including grZe_callbacks, grZe_803B7FF0, grZe_803E1B90, grZe_803E1C80, grZe_8049F140, grZe_8049F158, grZe_8049F170, grZe_804D6990, grZe_804D6994, and related constants.
Implemented material interactions using grMaterial_801C8CFC, grMaterial_801C8D44, grMaterial_801C8DE0, and grMaterial_801C8E08 with typed item/ground/material callback signatures.

Implemented stage-update logic that touches animation, map vertices, random timers, bubble state, acid-level handling, zako generator updates, and collision/fighter checks through existing ground, mp, ftLib, HSD, and lb APIs.
Adjusted config symbols so some previously global-looking grZe_* data became local @NNN constants, while grZe_callbacks received a meaningful symbol name.
Expanded Ground union variants with Zebes-specific structs for multiple map object state layouts.
smart_moves: Exposing grMaterial_801C8D44 through grmaterial.h was a small but necessary dependency fix instead of duplicating or keeping an incorrect static-only call path.
Refining grZakoGenerator_801CA43C to a concrete s32(void*, HSD_JObj*, f32) signature reduced UNK_PARAMS usage and made the Zebes generator update call sites clearer.
Using separate grZebes_GroundVars3/4/5 layouts avoided forcing unrelated Zebes map objects into one vague struct and preserved observed offsets in the Ground union.
The symbol updates distinguished real reusable globals from local constants, reducing false named-symbol confidence for sdata2 and data entries.
Reviewer-directed cleanup avoided leaving placeholder static arrays that implied a known data ordering before the full file was correctly matched.
decomp_lessons: Do not name or declare all recovered statics just because their addresses are visible; premature statics can imply a false ordering and make future matching harder.
For OSReport-style strings, prefer matching the literal use pattern seen in comparable files, such as grlast.c, instead of forcing separate static string objects when not needed.
HSD_ASSERT calls can reveal actual temporary names such as map_a_gobj; wait for those assertions rather than inventing names for temps too early.
For small Vec3 constants used only in a function, aggregate assignment like pos1 = { 24.1f, -4.6f, 0.0f }; can be treated as const without declaring extra file-scope static Vec3 objects.
When adding stage object state, keep offset comments and split layouts by object role; this helps verify Ground union accesses against gp+C4-style offsets.

AI/permuter-produced code may match but still needs cleanup for temp names, static data treatment, and readability; the PR explicitly noted AI assistance and included a 'permuterslop' comment in the diff.
naming_conventions: Meaningful stage callback tables can use a semantic name like grZe_callbacks instead of an address-only grZe_803E1A30 symbol.
Leave constants as local @NNN symbols in symbols.txt when there is no evidence they should be global grZe_* names.
Use grZe_* for Zebes data and local structs, and grZebes_* for functions, preserving the existing stage prefix convention.
Unknown struct fields retained offset-style names such as xC4, xE8, xA0_entries, and x00_active where semantic names were not proven.
Function pointer prototypes were upgraded from UNK_T/UNK_PARAMS to concrete types when call sites established Item_GObj*, Ground*, Vec3*, HSD_GObj*, and f32 parameters.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted tentative global sdata2 symbols such as grZe_804DB088/grZe_804DB08C and others into local @186/@187-style constants to better reflect compiler-generated locals.
Used in-place string literals for OSReport-style diagnostics rather than declaring standalone static char buffers.
Used typed callback signatures for material collision callbacks to satisfy matching call shapes and improve headers.
Preserved exact padding and offsets in grZe_YakumonoParam, grZe_BubbleEntry, grZe_AcidState, and Ground var structs to align with observed memory accesses.
Relied on HSD_Randf, animation helpers, mp vertex setters, and Ground_801C3FA4 JObj lookups in C to reproduce stage behavior instead of leaving assembly stubs.
Review suggested replacing file-scope static Vec3 constants with direct aggregate assignments so the compiler treats them as const in the desired way.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Asked whether OSReport-related statics could be fixed to be used in-place, pointing to grlast.c as an example.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Recommended removing the rest of the statics until the file is correctly matched, because premature declarations give a false impression of ordering; noted HSD_ASSERT may reveal actual temp names such as map_a_gobj.

review_feedback.author: jellejurre
review_feedback.feedback: Asked whether the adjusted handling of statics being used was acceptable.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Responded that the updated approach looked a lot better.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Suggested using direct Vec3 aggregate assignments for pos1 and pos2 so no separate const/static declarations were needed.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that clean up grzebes.c temp names or remove remaining permuterslop.
Search for subsequent changes to grZe_804D6990 typing, since grZebes_801DCBFC casts it through HSD_GObj in this slice.
Check whether grZe_803E1C80 size was later adjusted from 0x6C to the 0x60 plus strings split shown in symbols.txt.
Look for other stage PRs using in-place OSReport literals based on the grlast.c review guidance.
Search for later semantic names replacing grZebes_GroundVars4/5 xNN fields.
